programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: David Mostyn is shocked to find his mother Delyth in bed with Dr James Kirkwood, a senior partner in the Midsomer Market surgery, but the beautiful divorcee is delighted when James uses the occasion to propose to her - her daughter Megan, James' practice manager, is equally outraged and especially when Delyth tells her they are planning to sell up and travel the world. James also has the difficult task of telling Dorothy Hutton, his late wife's mother who is still grieving, and asks his surgery partner Alan Delaney to check on Dorothy while lending him his brand-new Range Rover for the journey - when Alan has to leave the car during a storm, a pick-up truck drives into him at speed and kills him. Barnaby and Jones dig into Alan's past and discover that James once accused him of stealing 30,000 pounds from the practice, but it was put down to clerical error and the two doctors made up - as Barnaby and Jones investigate, they find that they must travel to Snowdonia to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. The departure of Dr Dibbs sees Martin move back into his old surgery and agree to stay for a couple of months until a replacement can be appointed - determined to get to grips with fatherhood, he asks Louisa to move into his house so he can help to raise their child and even suggests that Louisa and the baby could move to London with him. Louisa reluctantly agrees to move into the Doc's house and offers to help with reception duties as Pauline has left, but she is none too sure about the move to London as she had hoped to resume her career as headmistress of the village school - meanwhile, Portwenn packs out the village church for the funeral of the Doc's Aunt Joan. As the villagers are shocked when Martin's eulogy becomes a health warning about the dangers to the heart of eating the wrong food, Joan's sister Ruth attends the funeral and demonstrates the same cantankerous character as her nephew after learning that she is to inherit Joan's house and farm.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Sleepless nights take their toll on Martin and Louisa as they try to find ways to comfort their constantly wailing baby, and Aunt Ruth deals with an intruder on the farm who has stolen the hubcaps from her car - when the thief is identified as Michael Dunwich, who lives with his mother Shirley, Ruth decides to pay a visit to the mother and her son. It soon becomes clear to psychiatrist Ruth that Michael is a bit odd as he has a collection of metal objects strewn around the garden - meanwhile, Shirley makes an appointment with Martin to discuss crippling stomach pains that she has been suffering from. When her son is out of the room, Shirley tells the Doc that she thinks that her son is trying to poison her so he can have the house to himself - elsewhere, new receptionist Morwenna Newcross fails to make a good impression by arriving late on her first day, appearing to be hyperactive, and getting sacked when Martin alleges that she is high on drugs.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on novels by Peter Robinson. DCI Banks is drawn into the criminal underworld of Soho when he reluctantly accepts an unofficial request from Chief Superintendent Rydell to find Rydell's missing daughter - with only an internet lead to go on, can Banks find Emily and persuade her to come home? Meanwhile, an armed robbery in Eastvale turns into a murder investigation after the thief is found brutally executed in his own home - DS Annie Cabbot struggles to identify credible suspects, but she and Banks come to a devastating realisation when another body is found.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Conclusion of a two-part story. With the discovery of a body in the nightclub, Banks finds himself at the heart of a murder investigation with any number of suspects and many unanswered questions - when a surveillance operation establishes a clear link between Barry Clough and the murder of Charles McKay, Banks and Cabbot realise that the two cases must be connected. The investigation then takes a number of alarming twists which push the detectives' relationship to breaking point and reveal a shocking secret within their own team.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway enter the archaic world of St Gerard's Hall when a visiting female bishop is found dead after drinking poisoned wine - was she was murdered because her liberal views contradicted those of the reactionary religious leaders of the college? When another two deaths occur and both mirror macabre murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy, Lewis and Hathaway realise that the motive is much more convoluted...

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a student dies during a clinical trial for a controversial new anti-depressant drug, is her death murder or suicide? Lewis and Hathaway investigate and, as the body count rises, uncover a web of lies, jealousy and madness that Lewis himself could fall victim to.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Gwenda Halliday has never been to England before - when she moves into the house of her dreams, she begins to have ghostly apparitions. On discovering that Gwenda grew up in the house as a child, the mystery takes a more sinister edge as she and Miss Marple realise that an unsolved murder was committed in the house.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's secret past as a British agent comes back to haunt him after a grisly murder in Midsomer Parva. A pleasant afternoon at a cricket match turns ugly when former county-cricketer - and ex-spy - Geoffrey Larkin is found gashed to death. Locals blame the 'beast of Midsomer', but Barnaby is unconvinced, especially when he discovers that umpire and retired spymaster Malcolm Frazer is using his home, Allenby House, as a safe house. Soon Barnaby discovers links to a spy ring that operated in Berlin during the Cold War, but his investigation is obstructed at every turn, and it seems as though shady dealings are still going on at Allenby House. Then there is another murder - can Barnaby solve the crime before any people get hurt? And will his police career survive a run-in with MI6? Guest starring Peter Davison, Alice Krige and Anna Massey.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When octogenarian Felicity Law puts a recently discovered piece by local landscape artist Henry Hogson up for auction, the painting causes a fierce bidding war. But soon after the sale, Felicity is found tortured and killed. She had announced that she would give the proceeds of the sale to the Arnold Simms School of Art, a school that helps criminals and which had recently lost its funding. Barnaby enlists Simms' art teacher daughter Matilda to help him navigate the local art world. He soon finds many tangled relationships between teachers, dealers and buyers. Things get more complicated when a Hogson masterpiece is stolen and Matilda's former lover Graham Spate offers another Hogson to greedy art dealer Anthony Prideaux. Then the death count begins to rise. The key to the case seems to be Matilda's 'little black book' - but can Barnaby and Jones find the book and catch the killer before anyone else gets hurt?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer University clashes with big business when science fellow George Jeffers threatens to go public with what he believes is a potentially lethal software glitch in a new air traffic control system. American software boss Clinton Finn fears he will lose millions if the truth comes out and puts pressure on the University authorities. But when village schoolteacher Emily Harte is killed by a hit-and-run driver, Barnaby wonders if Jeffers was the real target.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The body of a local troublemaker and lothario is found dead in the model village which is the chief tourist attraction of Little Worthy.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: As Grace navigates the aftermath of Sandy’s suicide, his newfound son Bruno, and a profound personal loss in his and Cleo’s life, his team is called to a Sussex beach when an unidentified male body washes up dead in a barrel. The very same morning, Brighton football stadium receives a chilling anonymous demand and is faced with an impossible decision. Roy, who is at the match bonding with Bruno, now finds himself locked in a frantic race to save hundreds of lives, which comes at great personal risk. But the day’s terrifying events are only just beginning when an eerie CCTV discovery comes to light, leading Grace to believe that the family of a wealthy club shareholder is being targeted. The question is why. When forensics on the body from the beach indicate that the victim may in fact be linked to events at the stadium, in order to save an innocent life from imminent death, Grace must enter a cruel world of corruption, where normal rules don’t apply, and human lives have no value.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The second part of a two-part story which closes the book on this long-running series. The past is catching up with Frost in more ways than one as a series of copycat crimes convinces Superintendent Mullett that his veteran DI's life is in danger - there are now two killers to bring to justice, but that will not happen until tragedy strikes.

programme.title: The Princess Diaries
programme.desc: A shy teenager discovers she's heir to a European throne. With awkward charm and royal lessons, she navigates transformation, etiquette, romance, and acceptance of destiny.

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express (2017)
programme.desc: When a murder occurs on the train on which he's travelling, celebrated detective Hercule Poirot is recruited to solve the case.

programme.title: Gremlin
programme.desc: A man receives a cryptic box holding a gruesome monster that will annihilate his loved ones. To stop the destruction, he has to pass the box to someone dear to him.

programme.title: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: Romcom with Julia Roberts and Richard Gere. A business trip leads to a chance encounter.

programme.title: The Adventurers
programme.desc: After five years of imprisonment, a thief teams up with his partner to conduct a heist in Europe. However, a French detective starts pursuing them.

programme.title: Ice Age: Dawn Of The Dinosaurs
programme.desc: When Sid's attempt to adopt three dinosaur eggs gets him abducted by their real mother to an underground lost world his friends attempt to rescue him.

programme.title: Cruella
programme.desc: Ambitious Estella transforms into daring Cruella, challenging fashion icon Baroness while chasing fame and revenge.

programme.title: Journey To The West:Conquering The Demon
programme.desc: Demon hunter Tang Sanzang seeks the Monkey King's help to defeat a pig demon.

programme.title: Rio
programme.desc: When Blu, a domesticated macaw, meets the fiercely independent Jewel, he takes off on an adventure to Rio de Janeiro with this bird of his dreams.

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Catch all the cool promos, music, and fillers from your favorite movies and shows, streaming back-to-back! It's the perfect way to enjoy non-stop entertainment in one go.

programme.title: Samson
programme.desc: When his youthful ambition leads to a tragic marriage, the all-powerful Samson embarks on a quest for vengeance that brings him into direct conflict with the Philistine army.

programme.title: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Ferdinand revisits themes of courage, friendship, and identity, offering family-friendly comedy and heartfelt emotional moments.

programme.title: Planet Of The Apes
programme.desc: When astronaut Taylor's spaceship crashes on an unknown planet, he realises that it is ruled by apes more advanced than humans.

programme.title: Dog
programme.desc: US Army Ranger Jackson Briggs travels with Lulu, a military dog, to the funeral of her handler. During their journey, the duo breaks laws and leaves no stone unturned in annoying each other.

programme.title: Operation Red Sea
programme.desc: A Chinese special forces unit must rescue their fellow citizens in the country of Yewaire on the Arabian Peninsula amidst violent coup and threats from a terrorist group.

programme.title: Monster Hunt 2
programme.desc: Wuba is separated from his parents and ventures out into the monster world. He teams up with Tu Sigu, a gambler, when he realises that the evil forces are out to kill him.

programme.title: Jojo Rabbit
programme.desc: A World War II satire that follows a lonely German boy whose world view is turned upside down when he discovers his single mother is hiding a young Jewish girl in their attic.

programme.title: Darkroom
programme.desc: Michelle takes a job recommended by her counselor that lands her trapped in a mansion with three psychotic siblings hell bent on purging Michelle of her sins.

programme.title: Frozen
programme.desc: In an attempt to save the kingdom from eternal winter, Anna teams up with a mountain man and his reindeer to find her sister, the Snow Queen.

programme.title: The Chronicles Of Narnia: Prince Caspian
programme.desc: The four Pevensie children return to Narnia where they are enlisted to help ward off an evil king and restore the rightful heir, to the land's throne.

programme.title: Mary Poppins Returns
programme.desc: Decades after her original visit, the magical nanny returns to help the Banks siblings and Michael's children through a difficult time in their lives.

programme.title: Monsters, Inc
programme.desc: Sulley and Mike work at Monsters, Inc., the biggest scream processing plant in Monstropolis

programme.title: She Wang Aka King Of Snake
programme.desc: A group of people set out to a dangerous journey to find cure of strong venom. A group of people set out to a dangerous journey to find cure of strong venom.

programme.desc: Sadhana and Ramkumar's marriage faces growing tension. Her family urges her to work things out, but will she be able to overcome her differences with her husband and find happiness?

programme.title: Main Aur Mera Haathi
programme.desc: Ram swears vengeance against Teja after he is framed and imprisoned for a crime he did not commit. After he is released from prison, Ram befriends an elephant who helps him in his quest.

programme.title: Jeevan Mrityu
programme.desc: An honest bank manager is arrested for embezzlement. After his release, he takes revenge on his colleagues who falsely implicated him.

programme.title: Samadhi
programme.desc: Lakhan Singh and his gang are known for their notoriety in the village. During one such raid he meets Champa and falls in love with her.

programme.title: Shagird
programme.desc: Professor Brij, who is sworn to bachelorhood, mentors Ramesh, who wants to be just like him. However, when the professor falls for Poonam, he faces a dilemma.

programme.title: Khushboo
programme.desc: Kusum and Brindavan love each other, and decide to marry when they grow up. But fate has other plans, both are separated. Years later they meet again.
